selectedSlice: Add route-backed site, program, and cohort labels to Global Admin recent role assignments so the Users & Access panel stays readable across schools.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap: the recent role-assignment panel was already useful, but it still guessed scope labels from the currently selected school's access payload. That made cross-school or off-site program grants fall back to raw ids or current-site-only context even though the existing /api/admin/role-assignments route was the protected source of truth and could safely return scope names without widening access.
candidateShortlist: Broader Global Admin route refresh across Recent Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Global Admin recent role assignments now show route-backed school, program, and cohort names even when no current school is selected, instead of falling back to raw scope ids or current-site-only guesses.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing /api/admin/role-assignments route and only adds readable scope labels to its protected read-only payload.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
The recent role-assignment disclosure remains Global Admin-only and still does not add any new mutation control.

validation.notes: Focused role-assignment route, workspace rendering, and workspace coverage passed before docs/state closeout. The full validation ladder also passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded role-labeling slice.
Filtered Audit cross-school proof still needs a tighter locally provable scenario before another audit pass.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise scoped destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
Student hosted drill-down refresh remains a broader hosted/product pass than this bounded Global Admin slice.
nextRecommended: Continue the bounded Global Admin route refresh only where the current workspace can prove an exact destination; preserve route-backed role-assignment labels and keep mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise backed path exists.
doNotRepeat: Do not fall back to current-site-only scope guesses in recent role assignments when the protected route already provides readable scope names.
Do not surface raw site, program, or cohort ids in the Global Admin role-assignment panel when a route-backed scope label is available.
Do not broaden Site Admin or other site-scoped workspaces with this Global Admin-only role-assignment disclosure.
